title: Worker Telemetry Specification

sources.note: TypeScript interface definitions for all telemetry event types and state machine logic
Canonical state machine spec; defines states and transitions this spec maps events to
Session identity field definitions (worker_id, session_id, provider)

scope: All 11 telemetry event types in the Foreman-to-Worker contract
Implementation gap: worker-acknowledged not emitted by src/loop/worker.ts

gaps_documented.description: worker-acknowledged event is specified but not currently emitted by the worker bootstrap sequence
